id: sacket
title: Sacket - Ticketing Website

description.en: Full-stack Laravel ticketing platform covering event management, booking flow, role-based access, QR ticket validation, and payment integration.
description.id: Platform ticketing full-stack berbasis Laravel untuk manajemen event, alur booking, akses berbasis role, validasi tiket QR, dan integrasi pembayaran.

en: End-to-end Laravel development
Event, ticket, promo, and order management
Multi-step booking and payment flow
Midtrans payment gateway integration
id: Pengembangan end-to-end menggunakan Laravel
Manajemen event, tiket, promo, dan pesanan
Alur booking dan pembayaran multi-step
Integrasi payment gateway Midtrans

scope.en: Booking flow, admin panel, roles, QR tickets, and payment
scope.id: Booking flow, admin panel, role, tiket QR, dan pembayaran

status.en: Source code, public demo reopening planned
status.id: Source code, demo publik akan dibuka ulang

id: dibelajarin-laravel
title: Dibelajarin - Learning Management System

description.en: Laravel-based LMS with Filament admin tooling, authentication, relational data design, and learning progress logic.
description.id: LMS berbasis Laravel dengan admin panel Filament, autentikasi, desain database relasional, dan logic progress belajar.

en: Laravel Breeze authentication
Filament admin panel for data management
Relational database design for LMS features
Custom learning progress and role-based flows
id: Autentikasi menggunakan Laravel Breeze
Panel admin Filament untuk manajemen data
Desain database relasional untuk fitur LMS
Logic custom untuk progress belajar dan role user

scope.en: Laravel backend, Filament admin, auth, and LMS data model
scope.id: Backend Laravel, admin Filament, auth, dan model data LMS

status.en: Source code, public demo reopening planned
status.id: Source code, demo publik akan dibuka ulang

id: dibelajarin-mern
title: DiBelajar.in - Learning Management System

description.en: Full-stack MERN learning platform with a Node.js API, MongoDB data model, and React frontend for role-based learning experiences.
description.id: Platform LMS full-stack MERN dengan API Node.js, model data MongoDB, dan frontend React untuk pengalaman belajar berbasis role.

en: Interactive Course Catalog: Browse available classes with detailed descriptions.
Role-based Access Control: Distinct experiences for students and instructors.
Secure Authentication: Custom login flow powered by JWT and MongoDB.
Learning Progress Tracking: Monitor completion rates and assignment statuses.
id: Katalog Kursus Interaktif: Telusuri kelas yang tersedia dengan mudah (lihat screenshot).
Akses Berbasis Peran: Tampilan berbeda untuk pengajar dan murid.
Autentikasi Aman: Alur login menggunakan JWT dan database MongoDB.
Pelacakan Progress: Pantau tingkat penyelesaian kursus dan tugas.

scope.en: Auth, API, database, course flow, and frontend integration
scope.id: Auth, API, database, alur kursus, dan integrasi frontend

id: frevan
title: Frevan - E-commerce Store

description.en: Full-stack e-commerce project with a secure Node.js backend and React storefront for product browsing, cart, and checkout flows.
description.id: Project e-commerce full-stack dengan backend Node.js yang aman dan storefront React untuk alur produk, keranjang, dan checkout.

en: Product Discovery: Browse high-quality product listings and categories.
Shopping Cart Flow: Add items, update quantities, and prepare for checkout.
Storefront UI: Built with React, Vite, and Redux Toolkit for maximum performance.
Secure Backend API: Node.js and MongoDB handling users and product logic.
id: Pencarian Produk: Telusuri daftar produk dan kategori e-commerce (lihat screenshot).
Alur Keranjang Belanja: Tambah barang, ubah kuantitas, dan proses checkout.
UI Storefront Responsif: Dibangun dengan React, Vite, dan Redux Toolkit.
API Backend Tangguh: Menggunakan Node.js dan MongoDB untuk data produk.

scope.en: REST API, product CRUD, cart, checkout, and React storefront
scope.id: REST API, CRUD produk, cart, checkout, dan storefront React

id: swapskill
title: SwapSkill - Student Skill Barter Platform

description.en: Full-stack skill-barter platform for students, combining a Laravel API with a Next.js frontend for discovery, offers, profiles, and reviews.
description.id: Platform barter skill full-stack untuk mahasiswa, menggabungkan API Laravel dan frontend Next.js untuk discovery, tawaran, profil, dan review.

en: Interactive Dashboard: View your skill points, recent notifications, and quick stats.
Skill Board & Barters: Explore available skills, submit barter offers, and accept/reject requests.
Token Authentication: Secure API authentication with Laravel Sanctum.
Next.js Frontend: Modern UI with profile management, user reviews, and bookmarks.
id: Dashboard Interaktif: Lihat poin skill, notifikasi, dan statistik performa (lihat screenshot).
Skill Board & Barter: Eksplorasi skill, ajukan barter, dan kelola request.
Keamanan Token: Autentikasi API yang aman menggunakan Laravel Sanctum.
Frontend Next.js: UI modern dengan manajemen profil, ulasan, dan bookmark.

scope.en: Skill board, profile, offer, review, notification, and admin flows
scope.id: Skill board, profil, tawaran, review, notifikasi, dan admin

status.en: Source code, public demo reopening planned
status.id: Source code, demo publik akan dibuka ulang

id: bi-dom
title: BI-DOM - Full-Stack Web App

description.en: Full-stack BI-DOM project combining a Laravel backend with a Next.js frontend for a database-driven application workflow.
description.id: Project BI-DOM full-stack yang menggabungkan backend Laravel dan frontend Next.js untuk alur aplikasi berbasis database.

en: Inventory Management: Track and update inventory stock in real-time.
Products Catalog: Manage product listings, categories, and pricing.
Invoices System: Generate, view, and print detailed invoices.
Full-Stack Integration: Separated Next.js frontend and Laravel backend.
id: Manajemen Inventori: Lacak dan perbarui stok barang secara real-time (lengkap di screenshot).
Katalog Produk: Kelola daftar produk, kategori, dan pengaturan harga.
Sistem Invoice: Buat, lihat, dan cetak tagihan (invoice) dengan detail lengkap.
Integrasi Full-Stack: Frontend Next.js dan backend Laravel yang terpisah.

scope.en: Laravel backend, Next.js frontend, database flow, and full-stack integration
scope.id: Backend Laravel, frontend Next.js, alur database, dan integrasi full-stack

status.en: Source code, public demo reopening planned
status.id: Source code, demo publik akan dibuka ulang

id: virtual-photobooth
title: Freedayz Studio - Virtual Photobooth

description.en: Interactive web-based photobooth with in-browser background removal (ML), GIF generation, cloud storage, email delivery, QR sharing, and full PWA support.
description.id: Photobooth interaktif berbasis web dengan penghapusan background via ML, pembuatan GIF, cloud storage, pengiriman email, berbagi QR, dan dukungan PWA penuh.

en: Interactive Camera Booth: Capture photos directly via web browser.
Cloud Gallery: View and share stored photobooth results securely.
AI Background Removal: Client-side ML processing for real-time background drops.
GIF Generation & Sharing: Export as animated GIFs with QR code sharing.
id: Kamera Photobooth Interaktif: Ambil foto langsung melalui browser (lihat screenshot).
Galeri Cloud: Lihat dan bagikan hasil foto yang tersimpan aman di Supabase.
Hapus Background via AI: Pemrosesan ML langsung di klien untuk ganti background.
Pembuatan GIF & Share: Ekspor sebagai GIF animasi dengan fitur bagikan QR code.

scope.en: Frontend, ML integration, media processing, cloud storage, email
scope.id: Frontend, integrasi ML, pemrosesan media, cloud storage, email

id: unpamcare
title: UnpamCare - AI Student Portal

description.en: AI-powered student services portal with LLM chatbot (Groq), web push notifications, custom JWT authentication, and Prisma-managed database.
description.id: Portal layanan mahasiswa berbasis AI dengan chatbot LLM (Groq), push notification, autentikasi JWT custom, dan database Prisma.

en: Interactive Dashboard: View student schedules, grades, and campus news.
AI Chatbot Integration: Smart assistant powered by Groq LLM for student inquiries.
Secure Login: Custom JWT authentication flow for student access.
Push Notifications: Stay updated with real-time web push alerts.
id: Dashboard Interaktif: Lihat jadwal, nilai, dan berita kampus mahasiswa (lihat screenshot).
Integrasi Chatbot AI: Asisten pintar berbasis Groq LLM untuk tanya jawab.
Login Aman: Sistem autentikasi JWT custom untuk keamanan akses.
Notifikasi Push: Tetap terhubung dengan peringatan real-time.

scope.en: AI integration, auth, push notifications, database
scope.id: Integrasi AI, autentikasi, push notification, database

id: cvku
title: CvKu - AI Resume Builder

description.en: Modern AI-assisted resume builder with real-time preview, ATS-friendly templates, and high-quality PDF export via React-PDF.
description.id: Pembuat CV modern berbasis AI dengan preview real-time, template ATS-friendly, dan ekspor PDF berkualitas tinggi via React-PDF.

en: Modern Landing Page: Discover CV templates and AI features seamlessly.
CV Editor Dashboard: Organize sections and generate content with AI.
Real-Time PDF Preview: View changes instantly via React-PDF rendering.
ATS-Friendly Export: Download professional resumes ready for applications.
id: Landing Page Modern: Jelajahi fitur pembuatan CV berbasis AI (lihat screenshot).
Dashboard Editor CV: Kelola bagian profil dan generate teks dengan bantuan AI.
Preview PDF Real-Time: Perubahan langsung terlihat berkat rendering React-PDF.
Ekspor Ramah ATS: Unduh resume profesional yang siap dikirim.

scope.en: AI integration, PDF rendering, auth, database
scope.id: Integrasi AI, rendering PDF, autentikasi, database

id: spk-all-in-one
title: SPK All-in-One - Decision Support System

description.en: Decision Support System implementing the MOORA algorithm with interactive drag-and-drop, data visualization, and PDF/Excel export.
description.id: Sistem Pendukung Keputusan mengimplementasikan algoritma MOORA dengan drag-and-drop interaktif, visualisasi data, dan ekspor PDF/Excel.

en: Data Visualization Dashboard: Interactive charts and analytics overview.
Criteria Management: Configure weights and types for decision making.
MOORA Algorithm Evaluation: Transparent calculation and ranking of alternatives.
Export Capabilities: Download results in PDF and Excel formats.
id: Dashboard Visualisasi Data: Grafik interaktif dan ringkasan analitik (lihat screenshot).
Manajemen Kriteria: Atur bobot dan jenis kriteria (Benefit/Cost) dengan mudah.
Evaluasi Algoritma MOORA: Perhitungan transparan untuk merangking alternatif.
Fitur Ekspor: Unduh laporan hasil keputusan ke PDF dan Excel.
puriva-fnb
title: Puriva Automasi FNB Order

description.en: A complex, automated FNB ordering system built with Next.js and Supabase. Features a POS board, real-time stock control, admin dashboard, and integrated payment gateways.
description.id: Sistem pemesanan FNB otomatis yang kompleks dengan Next.js dan Supabase. Memiliki POS board, kontrol stok real-time, dashboard admin, dan integrasi payment gateway.

en: Real-time stock availability check
Comprehensive Admin Dashboard
POS Board with invoice details
Supabase backend & Migrations
Integrated payment handling
id: Pengecekan stok ketersediaan real-time
Dashboard admin komprehensif
POS Board dengan detail invoice
Supabase backend & migrasi
Penanganan pembayaran terintegrasi

scope.en: E2E development, UI/UX, Backend logic, Database schema, POS System
scope.id: Pengembangan E2E, UI/UX, Logic Backend, Skema Database, Sistem POS

status.en: Source code available, fully automated testing and screenshots integration
status.id: Source code tersedia, integrasi otomatisasi testing & screenshot penuh

id: warung-mama-fina
title: Warung Mama Fina - Digital Menu & Order

description.en: Digital menu and ordering system for a local food stall with MongoDB backend, debounced search, and Turbopack.
description.id: Sistem menu digital dan pemesanan untuk warung lokal dengan backend MongoDB, pencarian debounce, dan Turbopack.

en: Digital Menu Dashboard: Browse available foods and drinks seamlessly.
Order Management (Penjualan): Track incoming orders and manage sales records.
Inventory Management (Barang): Full CRUD capabilities for stock and items.
Real-time Search: Fast, debounced search using MongoDB + Mongoose.
id: Dashboard Menu Digital: Eksplorasi menu makanan dan minuman (lihat screenshot beranda).
Manajemen Pesanan (Penjualan): Lacak pesanan masuk dan rekap data penjualan.
Manajemen Inventaris (Barang): Fitur CRUD lengkap untuk mengelola stok bahan baku.
Pencarian Real-time: Pencarian cepat dan debounce menggunakan MongoDB + Mongoose.
